relationships: kab:Ur yessaweḍ ara ad yeṭṭef iman-is deg ṭṭmeɛ
kab:Yeɛya deg ddunit-is, iṛuḥ ad ineɣ iman-is
kab:Ur yessaweḍ ara ad yeṭṭef iman-is seg ucmumeḥ-nni-ines yetturaren
kab:Tom ur yezmir ara ad yeṭṭef iman-is ɣef yimeṭṭawen
kab:Ur yezmir ara Tom ad yaṛǧu da iman-is
kab:Tom ur yezmir ara ad yeṭṭef iman-is
kab:Ur tezmir ara ad teṭṭef iman-is, neɣ ala ﹖
kab:Tom ur yessaweḍ ara ad yeṭṭef iman-is
